features.name: power operator with signed constant base and variable exponent
features.description: Code should include a power operation (**) where the base is a signed constant value (e.g., 2) and the exponent is a variable, triggering optimization passes that may incorrectly rewrite the expression

features.name: signed power of two transformed to shift
features.description: Code should include a power-of-two expression with a signed base where the synthesis tool may incorrectly replace 2**N with a left shift using a wrong sign-extended operand
